title: 高市首相 一連の日程終えオーストラリアを出発 帰国の途に
snippet: ベトナムとオーストラリアを訪れていた高市総理大臣は、両国との間でエネルギーの安定確保や重要鉱物のサプライチェーンの強じん化をめぐる協力を確認しました。一連の日程を終え、5日午前、帰国の途につきました。

title: ピュリツァー賞 トランプ政権を検証する報道の受賞相次ぐ
snippet: アメリカで優れた報道に贈られることしのピュリツァー賞に、連邦政府の大幅な人員削減の内幕を掘り下げたワシントン・ポストの報道など、トランプ政権の政策や言動の影響を検証した報道が選ばれました。

title: ロシアとウクライナ双方が異なる期間の停戦発表 実現不透明

title: 米ルビオ国務長官 ローマ教皇と会談へ イラン情勢で対立も
snippet: ローマ教皇庁は、ローマ教皇レオ14世がアメリカのルビオ国務長官と7日に会談すると発表しました。レオ14世とトランプ政権の間でイラン情勢などをめぐって関係の悪化が伝えられるなか、会談の内容が注目されます…

title: ゼレンスキー大統領「ロシア強くない」さらなる圧力強化求める

title: 鈴木宗男氏「ロシアから外相会談の用意ありと提案」

title: Hantavirus may have spread between passengers on cruise ship, WHO says
snippet: Two cases of the virus, which rarely spreads between humans, have been confirmed on the ship, and three people have died.

title: Russian attacks kill at least 20 ahead of rival ceasefires proposed by Kyiv and Moscow
snippet: Kyiv said it would begin a truce on 6 May and then "act symmetrically" after Moscow declared a pause for its Victory Day parade.

title: Nine coal miners die in gas explosion in Colombia
snippet: The explosion is the latest accident in the locality of Sutatausa, the site of another deadly mine disaster in 2023.

title: Two killed and many injured after car driven into crowd in German city of Leipzig
snippet: A 33-year-old German citizen was detained following the incident, the authorities say.

title: Romanian PM ousted in no-confidence vote
snippet: Ilie Bolojan lost the vote after the largest party in his coalition joined the far-right opposition to depose him.

title: Explosion at China fireworks factory kills 26 people
snippet: A blast at a fireworks factory in Hunan province has killed 26 people and injured 61, state media report.

title: A 'fun' superstar stuns rivals and reshapes politics in an Indian state
snippet: Film star Vijay has defied naysayers to almost sweep Tamil Nadu polls, marking a break in the political order.

title: Popular Australian author pleads guilty over child exploitation material
snippet: The Jasper Jones and Runt author was arrested in January during a police raid at his Perth home.

title: Rescuers among three dead after yacht sinks off Australian coast
snippet: Volunteer rescuers aged 78 and 62 died after their boat rolled during "treacherous" conditions.

title: Deadly China plane crash was caused by fuel cut-off, says report

title: Rapper Kid Cudi removes British star M.I.A. from tour

title: Ukrainian drone hits upmarket Moscow high-rise ahead of Victory Day celebrations

title: Three Russian diplomats expelled from Austria over spying accusations

title: Mali junta leader names himself defence minister after predecessor killed
snippet: Former Defence Minister Sadio Camara was killed in a massive offensive by combined jihadist and separatist forces.

title: Britney Spears pleads guilty to reckless driving after arrest
snippet: The 44-year-old will avoid jail time after her arrest in California earlier this year.

title: ウクライナ外相“ロシアがウクライナ主張の停戦を破った”非難
snippet: ロシアによる軍事侵攻が続く中、ウクライナは、6日から停戦に入ると主張していましたが、ウクライナのシビハ外相は、ロシアが100機以上の無人機などで攻撃を行ったと非難し、各国にロシアに対して制裁などで圧力…

title: NY原油市場 一時90ドル割れ イラン情勢緊張緩和への期待感から
snippet: 6日のニューヨーク原油市場では、イラン情勢の緊張緩和への期待感から、国際的な取り引きの指標となるWTIの先物価格が一時、1バレル＝90ドルを割り込み、88ドル台まで下落しました。

title: 北朝鮮の改正憲法 核戦力の指揮権明記 「祖国統一」の条項削除
snippet: 改正された北朝鮮の憲法の内容が明らかになり、キム・ジョンウン（金正恩）総書記が務める国務委員長が核戦力の指揮権を持つことが明記されたほか、「祖国統一」に関する条項がなくなり、韓国を別の国家と規定する姿…

title: 中国の大型連休 本土から香港に訪問100万人超 マナー違反も
snippet: 中国の大型連休の期間中、香港には中国本土から100万人以上が訪れましたが、観光地ではゴミの放置などのマナー違反が後を絶たず、対策の強化を求める声が出ています。

title: Massive Alaska megatsunami was second largest ever recorded
snippet: A new scientific analysis of the event shows tiny earthquakes triggered a massive landslide.

title: German police raid neo-Nazi criminal youth groups
snippet: Police search locations in 12 states, mainly in the East and South of the country in what prosecutors say is a targeted raid.

title: Russia ignores Ukraine's unilateral ceasefire and attacks kindergarten
snippet: Ukraine's president says Russia has "spurned the ceasefire" and Kyiv is deciding on further action to take.

title: Orphaned baby hippo to be hand-reared by keepers at Kenya sanctuary
snippet: The baby hippo, which has been named Bumpy, was found clinging to its lifeless mother at a lake.

title: China calls for Strait to be reopened 'as soon as possible' in Iran talks
snippet: Wang Yi is holding talks with Iran's foreign minister Aragchi who is on his first trip to China since the war began.
